author: wepee
description: Define custom sort orders per folder, overriding the global file explorer sorting with independent rules for files and subfolders. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Adam
manifest.description: Define custom sort orders per folder, overriding the global file explorer sorting with independent rules for files and subfolders.
manifest.name: Folder Sort Rules

name: Folder Sort Rules

releases.author: wepee
releases.description:
Initial release of Folder Sort Rules.

- Per-folder custom sort orders (7 options including manual drag & drop)
- Independent sorting for files and subfolders
- Recursive rule application
- Settings-based configuration with folder autocomplete
